user_message: Summarize what happened with Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery and give me the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-24 14:07 EST
Subject: Re: Re: territory planning Timeline

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with territory planning. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
Date: 2024-02-28 15:21 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery territory planning

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about territory planning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-01 16:59 EST
Subject: URGENT: territory planning Issue at Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with territory planning. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

Meeting: territory planning Discussion - Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery
Date: 2024-03-11
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is territory planning.

[00:06:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): The timeline for budget approval is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:10:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is vendor dependencies.

[00:14:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Let me add some context -- we've been working on performance requirements and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:18:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:20:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:25:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about partner engagement. Can we address those?

[00:29:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around cost optimization.

[00:32:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.
